advancements.aelori.root.title: Tides of Aelori
advancements.aelori.root.description: Your journey on the shattered shore begins.
advancements.aelori.quest.q01_gather_woo: Gathered 32 oak logs for the village stockpile.
advancements.aelori.quest.q02_deliver_fo: Delivered 64 bread to the village storehouse.
advancements.aelori.quest.q03_light_torc: Placed torches at all 6 perimeter positions.
advancements.aelori.quest.q04_repair_wal: Repaired all 4 wall gaps in the village defenses.
advancements.aelori.quest.q05_craft_bann: Crafted and raised the Aelori banner at the Town Hall.
advancements.aelori.quest.q06_scout_coas: Scouted the eastern coast and witnessed the threat of Korvath.
advancements.aelori.quest.q07_survive_ra: Survived the Korvathi raid on Aelori village.
advancements.aelori.quest.q08_deliver_ir: Delivered iron ingots to Smith Dorek for better equipment.
